svg.title: Supplier Agent project root structure
svg.desc: Full directory tree for the Supplier Agent project, annotated by phase
svg.text: Phase 1 delivers 21 files. Phase 2 adds models/, prompts/, seed.py, and the first Alembic migration.
No ollama/ directory — model pulled natively. Dashed borders = created later or at runtime.
GPU: run setup.sh (Linux only), then append -f docker-compose.gpu.yml to the compose command.
